description: End-to-end verdict fixtures for combined-eval.mjs: text scoring + page signal + image fusion. imageScore values are calibrated poster scores recorded in ml-bridge.js (Cape Fear 72, Hereditary 74, Nun 51, Insidious 59, Devil Wears Prada 37, Mortal Kombat 34, White House Down 0) plus synthetic stress points. page references the pages map; mediaSite mirrors isMediaSiteCached(). gate entries exit nonzero on mismatch. sensitivity defaults to medium.
